caption:
"Metroid: Ravenous" just leaked through Brazil's ratings board — before any official reveal.

Ratings-board leaks are how the real news breaks. Found in my feed before the timeline noticed.

#threadverse #Gaming #IndieGames #GameDev #tech #feeds

Bloomberg: Anthropic's Opus 4.7 is out, better at software and its strongest model so far — with a limited Mythos release. The Claude news my feed surfaced before the timeline.

#Threadverse #AI #MachineLearning #LLM #Tech

Apple gave Siri the AI upgrade we've waited years for at WWDC 2026, alongside iOS 27. The full breakdown, found before the timeline.

#threadverse #AI #MachineLearning #LLM #tech #feeds

Compulsion, Double Fine, Ninja Theory, Undead Labs — all out. Xbox laid off 3,200 and Arkane's future looks grim. If you loved Dishonored, read this. Caught before the timeline noticed.

#Threadverse #Gaming #IndieGames #GameDev #Tech

Someone nailed pre-internet Kant: an ogre grinding through Ulysses, catching the surface, missing "remorse of conscience" entirely. We forget how hard dense texts were before explainers existed. Found before the timeline.

#threadverse #Philosophy #DeepThoughts #Thinking #tech #feeds

A Solana DeFi protocol lost $661K to a single programming blunder — not a hack, a typo-level mistake. This is why you read the audit. Found before the timeline piled on.

#Threadverse #Crypto #Bitcoin #Web3 #Tech

Sony's ending disc production for all PS5 games by 2028. Layoffs, Hollywoodification, no ownership. The industry take my feed surfaced before the timeline caught it.

#threadverse #Gaming #IndieGames #GameDev #tech #feeds

Domyn's CEO says Italy will release a fully open-source frontier AI model inside 12 months. The frontier isn't just US vs China anymore — Europe wants an open seat. The stuff my feed keeps.

#Threadverse #AI #MachineLearning #LLM #Tech

Gemini Nano brings efficient on-device AI to Android — no cloud round-trip. The top 3 from Google I/O '25 for anyone building mobile. The stuff my feed keeps.

#threadverse #AI #MachineLearning #LLM #tech #feeds

MIT's SCIGEN lets researchers force design rules into generative models — so the AI stops hallucinating and starts proposing materials that actually work. AI as a discovery engine, not a chatbot. Found before the timeline.

#Threadverse #Feedreader #DigitalWellbeing #Productivity #Tech

Since 2017, Iason Gabriel has worked inside Google DeepMind on one question: what is this thing we're building? The Guardian long read my feed kept for you.

#threadverse #Philosophy #DeepThoughts #Thinking #tech #feeds

Another DeFi protocol got hit by a new security exploit. If you hold anything on-chain, the gap between the breach and the headline is where you get liquidated. Surfaced before the timeline knew.

#Threadverse #Crypto #Bitcoin #Web3 #Tech

Double Fine, Compulsion — gone in a single round of Microsoft layoffs. "AAA gaming is killing the industry" isn't a hot take anymore, it's the news. The signal my feed surfaces before it trends.

#threadverse #Gaming #IndieGames #GameDev #tech #feeds

Google just unveiled Gemini Spark, an AI agent — plus Gemini Omni, Flow Music, smart glasses, and an OpenAI partnership. Everything from I/O, found before the timeline caught up.

#Threadverse #AI #MachineLearning #LLM #Tech

Classic AI, Generative AI, Active AI. One clean map for the models that'll get built on next. If you're deciding what to build, this framework beats another hype thread. The stuff my feed keeps.

#threadverse #AI #MachineLearning #LLM #tech #feeds

Encryption breakthrough from NYU lets AI run on data it can never actually read. Private inference stops being a fantasy. This is the kind of research my feed surfaces before the timeline does.

#Threadverse #Feedreader #DigitalWellbeing #Productivity #Tech

Monty Python put Socrates, Kant and Nietzsche on a football pitch — and it teaches more epistemology than most 101 lectures. Comedy as the best gateway drug to philosophy. Found before the timeline buried it.

The European Parliament advanced a resolution to assess DeFi, staking and NFTs — full plenary vote is scheduled. If you're on-chain in the EU, this shapes what's still legal. Found before the timeline.

Alien: Isolation 2 got its official reveal at Summer Game Fest 2026, Geoff Keighley hosting. The sequel horror fans waited a decade for. Found before the timeline.

ShengShu's Vidu S1 does real-time interactive video generation — the China AI story most Western feeds miss. The signal my feed catches before the timeline.

Argument that many small, specialized models orchestrated together beat one monolith. If true, it reshapes how you'll build with AI. The contrarian takes my feed keeps before they go big.

Valve dropped Workshop tools for Half-Life: Alyx and added Linux support. The VR classic is now fully moddable. The dev-native drop my feed keeps and the algo skips.

Philosophy isn't just "soft science" — Mary Midgley says treating it that way guts what it's for. If you think STEM ate everything, read her. Found before the timeline.

Tokenized stocks are doing $34B/month, up 40x in 13 months. Nvidia, Tesla, Micron now trade as RWAs on-chain. TradFi is quietly moving to DeFi rails. Found before the timeline noticed.

The mind behind ICO and Shadow of the Colossus goes open-world on Xbox with gen ATLAS. The reveal my feed surfaced before the timeline lost its mind.

Stanford's 2026 AI Index says the US-China frontier gap effectively closed — top models now trade leads within ~2.7%. The lead everyone assumed is basically gone. Found in my feed before the timeline.

"Just a transformation," the creators said. Devs said the industry is on fire.

Who makes the games after the AI tools dust off? The debate my feed keeps while the timeline argues past it.

An exploit pumped a tokenized Google stock to 78x its worth, leaving $403K in bad debt — and Chainlink oracles missed it. Tokenized stocks are only as safe as the price feed. Found before the timeline.

Monthly frontier releases mean AI shipping now feels like CD — always-on, never a finished version. The release rhythm changed and most people missed it. The stuff my feed keeps for you.

Cold Iron is back in the Xenomorph business. The reveal my feed caught the moment it went live.

Google Research launched TabFM, a foundation model for tabular data that does zero-shot classification in one forward pass. No per-dataset tuning. This is the research my feed keeps.
